author: y4rr
content: Closing as partial-superseded. Sprint C.7 (commit eaa20c0f) landed MtlBackend scaffold + 10 MSL kernels. Sprint M subsequently closed all 18 follow-up sub-issues: #941 (elementwise unary), #942 (activations), #943 (activation backward), #944 (reductions), #945 (broadcast binary), #946 (linalg f64), #947 (linalg solvers), #948 (normalization), #949 (dropout Philox), #950 (conv2d/pool), #951 (flash attention), #952 (FFT), #953 (indexing/slicing), #954 (sparse tensor ops), #955 (embedding), #956 (optimizer fusion), #957 (gradient checkpoint RNG), #958 (masked fill/zero). All ~80 GpuBackend trait methods now covered. Closing umbrella.
